changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Non-blocking indexes to speed data_layer type and metadata filtering
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_data_layer_meta_type_expr ON data_layer ((metadata->>'type'));

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Partial indexes for selective data_layer metadata values (useful when small subset queried frequently)
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_data_layer_registered_parks ON data_layer (data_layer_type_id) WHERE data_layer_type_id = 3 AND (metadata->>'type') = 'registered_parks_gardens';
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_data_layer_registered_battlefields ON data_layer (data_layer_type_id) WHERE data_layer_type_id = 3 AND (metadata->>'type') = 'registered_battlefields';
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_data_layer_scheduled_monuments ON data_layer (data_layer_type_id) WHERE data_layer_type_id = 3 AND (metadata->>'type') = 'scheduled_monuments';
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_data_layer_shine ON data_layer (data_layer_type_id) WHERE data_layer_type_id = 3 AND (metadata->>'type') = 'shine';

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Support GROUP BY on parcel_id, sheet_id and land_cover_class_code

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Add deterministic geom_hash generated column and supporting index to speed exact-geometry grouping
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE land_covers ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS geom_hash text GENERATED ALWAYS AS (md5(encode(ST_AsBinary(geom), 'hex'))) STORED;

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: application_results: create descending index to speed ORDER BY created_at DESC (non-blocking)
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_application_results_created_at ON application_results (created_at DESC);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: ingest_files: index ingest_id to speed joins/filters
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_ingest_files_ingest_id ON ingest_files (ingest_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: ingest: index status to speed status filtering
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_ingest_status ON ingest (status);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: actions_config: add index on group_id to speed FK-like lookups
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_actions_config_group_id ON actions_config (group_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.comment: Update planner statistics to improve query performance after adding indexes
